lifecycleScripts.afterStart: npx @wordpress/env run cli -- wp option update blogname powerfunnelE2E && npx @wordpress/env run cli -- wp option update blogdescription E2ETesting && npx @wordpress/env run cli -- wp rewrite structure /%postname%/ && npx @wordpress/env run cli -- wp rewrite flush && npx @wordpress/env run cli -- wp language core install zh_TW && npx @wordpress/env run cli -- wp site switch-language zh_TW
